title: rosa spinosissima f. luteola
intro: Rosa spinosissima f. luteola, also known as the yellow prickly rose, is a flowering plant species that is a variant of the Rosa spinosissima, characterized by its bright yellow color and thorny stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. Rosa spinosissima f. luteola is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems, as well as its potential to promote wound healing and reduce menstrual cramps. In herbal preparations, Rosa spinosissima f. luteola is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
